title: Heart Crosshair by muku muku studio
description:
✨ Replace your crosshair with a cute little heart 💜

Compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.20.2, 1.21+~

Small, adorable and functional! ꒰｡•◡•｡꒱

IG: @mukumuku.studio
body:
![ In-game screenshot of Minecraft using shaders, showing a clean user interface in Creative mode. The center of the screen features a custom crosshair shaped like a small heart, glowing slightly against a soft-toned landscape background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2094ccd57db574df913f7b829708201b26da0f2a.png)

### A cute and simple resource pack that replaces the default Minecraft crosshair with a heart-shaped one 💜✨

Made with lots of love for cozy gamers and aesthetic lovers 🫶


✅ Works for Minecraft versions 1.20.1 to 1.21.5 — no mods required!

Just install, activate, and enjoy your lovely new aim 💘


_**🟣 Important: Due to how icons.png works in 1.20.1, this pack loads the default GUI (hearts, hunger, etc), so it's not compatible with other packs that modify the GUI, as it will overwrite them.**_

_**✨ Versions for 1.20.2+ are now available and fully compatible with other GUI packs.
We’re working on keeping the pack updated for future versions, so stay tuned for more updates! 💜**_
